title: elatostema sesquifolium
intro: Elatostema sesquifolium is a plant species belonging to the nettle family (Urticaceae), commonly known as the 'half-leaved elatostema'. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elatostema sesquifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Elatostema sesquifolium is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in some parts of Asia.
